summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trade Network feature for Rebel Trade Network. All backend API endpoints (20 tests) and frontend UI components passed successfully.
passed_tests: POST /api/network/request - Send network request to another user
POST /api/network/request - Cannot send request to self (400)
POST /api/network/request - Returns 404 for non-existent user
GET /api/network/requests/pending - Returns incoming and outgoing requests
GET /api/network/requests/pending - Correct response structure with user details
POST /api/network/respond - Accept network request creates connection
POST /api/network/respond - Decline network request updates status
POST /api/network/respond - Returns 404 for non-existent request
GET /api/network/connections - Returns list of connected users
GET /api/network/connections - Correct response structure with user details
GET /api/network/status/{user_id} - Returns 'connected' for connected users
GET /api/network/status/{user_id} - Returns 'none' for non-connected users
POST /api/network/cancel/{request_id} - Cancels pending request
POST /api/network/cancel/{request_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent request
DELETE /api/network/connections/{user_id} - Removes connection
DELETE /api/network/connections/{user_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent connection
GET /api/posts - Returns is_network field for network members
GET /api/posts - Returns feed_score field with network priority (+200)
All network endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
Full integration flow: request -> accept -> verify -> remove
Desktop sidebar shows 'My Trade Network' nav item
Trade Network Panel loads with Network and Requests tabs
Requests tab shows Incoming and Sent requests sections
Profile panel shows 'My Trade Network' section with connection count
Mobile nav shows 'NETWORK' item
Mobile Trade Network Panel loads correctly
User Profile Modal shows 'Add to Trade Network' button
User Profile Modal shows 'Message' button
seed_data_creation: Created test users for network flow testing (TEST_NetworkUser1, TEST_NetworkUser2, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade Network feature is fully implemented and tested. Backend has 7 network endpoints: POST /api/network/request, POST /api/network/respond, GET /api/network/requests/pending, GET /api/network/connections, DELETE /api/network/connections/{user_id}, GET /api/network/status/{user_id}, POST /api/network/cancel/{request_id}. Feed algorithm now includes is_network and feed_score fields with +200 priority for network members. Frontend has TradeNetworkPanel with connections/requests tabs, UserProfileView modal with Add to Network button, and network badges in sidebar and mobile nav.

Frontend Components.UserProfileView: Working with Add to Network button
